ideas.title: first video
ideas.notes: a first video about who I am and why they should follow me. So what does it look like you have so many goals but not bringing any of them into life. Welcome into my ADHD brain, ive been feeling like I'm not using my full potential, yes I did travel the world by myself, I randomly moved to dubai, it doesn't make up for all the things I want that I'm avoiding, such as posting this. I keep coming up with so many excuses by now is not the right time, I only should start a certain thing in my life happens, that's the truth is I don't think I'm ever gonna feel ready, so here is showing up anyways.
ideas.script: So what does it look like

ideas.title: Leven
ideas.notes: Life is only as hard as you make it and that is why

ideas.title: Take 1
ideas.hook: So yes i did lie, but i didnt have a choise
ideas.script: How do i admit that the reason why i havent started was not me be too busy. I cant convince myself that it was logical that i spend days making a content planner on claude with zero content to plan was rational. But i guess it kept me safe. Safe from being cringe, safe from posting and no one watching my videos. They were all excuses, because i realise being creative does not have to be perfect, it has to be fun and thru to yourself. So welcome to my first video

series.name: leaving it all
series.desc: this serie is about leaving behind my life in dubai to go in to start my own business
